name: wechat-assistant
description: Operate the logged-in WeChat Mac client through visible UI with explicit user confirmation.

interface.shortDescription: Read visible WeChat chats and draft/send confirmed messages.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin for operating the user's logged-in WeChat Mac client through the visible desktop UI. It does not decrypt databases, bypass login, or read messages in the background.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the WeChat Mac client to read the visible chat or prepare a message for confirmation.
